TABLE II TESTING PERFORMANCE OF THE NODE, FODE, AND XFODE MODELS: RMSE REPORTED AS MEAN ±1 STANDARD ERROR OVER 20 EXPERIMENTS
Fig. 3. RMSE boxplots of trained models on (a) Two-Tank and (b) MR-Damper datasets; SR1 with the white, SR2 with the gray background.

Fig. 2. Visualization of learned MFs on the Two-Tank dataset (single seed). States are defined with the incremental form (SR2), thus z = [y;∆y;∆2y;u]. Each combined input dimension zi is interpretable: z1 output position, z2 output velocity, z3 output acceleration, and z4 control input.
